calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
David Mendez, Esq. for for Plaintiff: T.D. Thakor.
Plaintiff's Witness: Anil Patel, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jeffery Ray.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day notice------------------------ID/EVID.
Plaintiff Mtn. to Amend the Defendant's Room Number in the complaint is granted in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 56 Mason St., #218, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,516.00
Costs $186.00
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
